name: gguf-quantized-txt2img
title: GGUF Quantized FLUX.1-schnell Text to Image
description: Text-to-image workflow using GGUF-quantized FLUX.1-schnell with ComfyUI-GGUF (city96). Runs Q4_K_S quantized UNET and Q8_0 T5-XXL encoder, significantly reducing VRAM requirements compared to full-precision models. NOTE: .gguf model files cannot be included in the template bundle and must be downloaded manually — see submission.md for download URLs and placement paths.
